creator: vidar@karlsen.tech
text:
(In reply to Alex Matei from comment #0)
You can get the files for building the port from GitHub [1] or the pkg directly from the pkg repo servers [2].

[1] https://github.com/alexdupre/rtl_bsd_drv
[2] https://pkgmir.geo.freebsd.org/FreeBSD:14:amd64/latest/All/realtek-re-kmod-1100.00.pkg
